nodes.label: Graphify Agent Rule
nodes.description: Always-on rule directing agents to consult the graphify knowledge graph at graphify-out/ for codebase and architecture questions before falling back to raw source browsing.

nodes.label: Graphify Knowledge Graph
nodes.description: Persistent knowledge graph stored under graphify-out/ with graph.json, GRAPH_REPORT.md, and wiki/index.md, queried via CLI (query/path/explain) or MCP (query_graph/shortest_path/get_node).

nodes.label: Graphify Workflow
nodes.description: Workflow that turns any folder of files into a navigable knowledge graph, following the graphify skill at ~/.gemini/config/skills/graphify/SKILL.md; defaults to the current directory.

nodes.label: Sanad Legal Dashboard
nodes.description: Sanad — daily operations dashboard for Saudi lawyers and law students, covering compliance, cases, tasks, documents, and invoicing.

nodes.label: Sanad Deployment Guide
nodes.description: Production deployment guide covering quick start, system requirements, deployment options, SSL, database, PWA, and security checklist.

nodes.label: Quick Start Setup
nodes.description: Five-minute bootstrap: git clone, bun install, copy .env, bun run db:push, optional seed, ./deploy.sh build, ./deploy.sh restart; serves at http://localhost:3000.

nodes.label: Direct Bun Deployment
nodes.description: Option A — runs the server via ./deploy.sh deploy as a background Bun process logging to logs/sanad-out.log; simple but no auto-restart.

nodes.label: PM2 Deployment
nodes.description: Option B — recommended production deployment using PM2 with ecosystem.config.cjs for auto-restart, log management, clustering, and monitoring.

nodes.label: Systemd Deployment
nodes.description: Option C — dedicated-server deployment via /etc/systemd/system/sanad.service running .next/standalone/server.js with auto-restart.

nodes.label: Caddy Reverse Proxy
nodes.description: Caddyfile-based reverse proxy to localhost:3000 with automatic Let's Encrypt HTTPS and Brotli compression.

nodes.label: Nginx + Certbot
nodes.description: Alternative HTTPS setup using Nginx as reverse proxy with Certbot-managed SSL certificates.

nodes.label: SQLite Database
nodes.description: Default zero-config database stored at db/custom.db, backed up by file copy, suitable for up to ~100 concurrent users.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL Option
nodes.description: Multi-user/enterprise database alternative requiring DATABASE_URL update and bun run db:push migration.

nodes.label: PWA Service Worker
nodes.description: Progressive Web App support via public/manifest.json and public/sw.js, enabling install on desktop/mobile and offline read access.

nodes.label: NextAuth Authentication
nodes.description: next-auth is installed but not configured; requires NEXTAUTH_URL/SECRET env vars and provider config at src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts.

nodes.label: Sanad File Structure
nodes.description: Project layout: Next.js App Router with 35 API routes, 15 sanad feature views, shadcn/ui components, Prisma schema, deploy.sh, ecosystem.config.cjs, Caddyfile.

nodes.label: sanad-ar-compliance.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad compliance tracker view (متتبع الامتثال) in Arabic (RTL). Shows a Kanban-style card grid of 10 compliance items across 6 categories — residency (إقامة), commercial registry (سجل تجاري), contracts (عقد), licenses (رخصة), tax (ضريبة), and insurance (تأمينات). Cards are colour-coded by urgency: expired (red), <30 days (orange/pink), 30–90 days (amber), healthy (green). A sidebar nav links to Dashboard, Compliance (active, badge=4), Cases, Deep Work, Tasks, and Documents. A PWA install banner appears in the bottom-right corner. Footer reads: 'Sanad — daily operations dashboard for lawyers and small businesses in Saudi Arabia.'

nodes.label: Compliance Tracker View (متتبع الامتثال)
nodes.description: A dedicated view in the Sanad app for tracking renewal deadlines across legal and administrative compliance categories. Displays a summary row (expired / <30 days / 30-90 days / healthy), filter tabs by category, and a card grid. Each card shows entity name, category badge, expiry date, remaining days with a progress bar, optional action note, and a 'mark as renewed' button.

nodes.label: Compliance Urgency Colour Coding
nodes.description: Four-tier visual urgency system used on compliance cards: (1) منتهي / expired — red border; (2) أقل من 30 يوماً / <30 days — pink/orange highlight; (3) 30–90 يوماً / 30-90 days — amber; (4) سليم / healthy — green. Counts per tier are surfaced in a summary bar at the top of the view.

nodes.label: Compliance Item Categories
nodes.description: Six compliance categories tracked by the app: إقامة (residency permits), سجل تجاري (commercial registry), عقد (employment/work contracts), رخصة (professional licenses), ضريبة (tax filings — e.g. VAT Q2), and تأمينات (social insurance subscriptions). Counts in the screenshot: All=10, إقامة=3, سجل تجاري=2, عقد=2, رخصة=1, ضريبة=1, تأمينات=1.

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: Right-aligned Arabic sidebar with links to: لوحة التحكم (Dashboard), الامتثال (Compliance — active with badge 4), لوحة القضايا (Cases), العمل العميق (Deep Work), المهام (Tasks), المستندات (Documents). App branding 'سند / العمليات اليومية' shown top-right.

nodes.label: Sanad PWA Support
nodes.description: App is installable as a Progressive Web App (PWA). A toast/banner at bottom-right confirms installation with prompt to pin to desktop for daily access. Footer confirms local-server hosting with PWA enabled ('محتضن للخادم المحلي : PWA مُفعَّل').

nodes.label: Arabic RTL UI Design
nodes.description: The entire UI is rendered in Arabic with right-to-left (RTL) layout. Sidebar is on the right, content flows right-to-left, date/time headers are in Arabic numerals and Arabic calendar labels. Language toggle (EN / AR) is present in the top bar.

properties.description: Arabic-language UI screenshot of the Sanad legal app's Deep Work and Billing view. Shows a Pomodoro-based focus timer integrated with client billable hours tracking. Layout is RTL. Three session modes: Break, Billable, Deep Focus. Timer displays 25:00 paused. Left panel shows today's stats and recent sessions list. App is installed as PWA.
properties.view_title: العمل العميق والفوترة (Deep Work and Billing)

properties.description: A Pomodoro focus timer combined with billable-hours tracking linked to client case files. Session state is persisted locally between visits. Supports three modes: Break, Billable, Deep Focus.
Countdown timer supporting preset durations: 15m, 25m, 45m, 60m, 90m. Can be started or stopped/saved. State is saved locally (PWA offline support). Displays current elapsed time and paused state.

Tracks time spent on client matters that is billable. Sessions tagged as 'Billable' are linked to client case files and included in invoice generation. Today's panel shows total billing hours (1h 30m) and today's billing revenue (1,275 SAR).

Left-side panel listing recent work sessions with their duration, date, type tag (Billable / Focus), and billed amount. Examples include acquisition agreement review, confidentiality agreement deep work, and lawsuit drafting.
example_sessions: مراجعة اتفاقية الاستحواذ — صيدليات الخليج (Billable, 1,275 SAR)

properties.description: Right-side vertical navigation bar with icon+label links. Active item highlighted in green. Items: Dashboard, Compliance (badge:4), Cases Board, Deep Work (active), Tasks (badge:9), Documents.

The Sanad app is installable as a Progressive Web App (PWA). Footer confirms 'Installed as PWA · Local server · PWA enabled'. Timer state persists locally between visits, enabled by service worker offline storage.

The entire interface is right-to-left Arabic. Navigation is on the right, content flows right-to-left. Green accent (#2d6a4f-ish) used for active states. Clean minimal design suited for legal professionals in Saudi Arabia.
React component implementing the Deep Work and Billing view shown in the screenshot.

nodes.label: Sanad Arabic RTL Dashboard Screenshot

Key UI sections: urgent cases count (1), expiring compliance items (4, >30 days), overdue tasks (1), active cases (6), open tasks (9), today's billing hours (1,275 SAR), focus hours (3h45m). The daily digest panel shows news from Ministry of Justice, HR Ministry, and Zakat Authority. Today's priorities panel shows an NDA follow-up task. nodes.description: Design pattern: full Arabic right-to-left interface with Hijri/Gregorian dual calendar, bilingual (AR/EN) toggle, and locale-appropriate number formatting (٣٤٥ ثث / اس ٣٠دد). Affects layout mirroring, navigation placement, and text direction across all views.

nodes.label: Compliance Tracking & Countdown

nodes.label: Daily Digest News Feed

Displays article titles, dates, and read-more links relevant to legal practitioners in Saudi Arabia.

nodes.label: PWA Self-Hosted Deployment
nodes.description: App is delivered as a Progressive Web App hosted on a local (home) server (الخادم المنزلي). Footer confirms 'PWA مفعل' (PWA enabled). Allows offline access and desktop installation without app store dependency.

nodes.label: Focus & Billing Time Tracking
nodes.description: Dashboard surfaces two time-tracking metrics: ساعات التركيز (focus/deep-work hours, shown as 3h45m) and ساعات الفوترة (billable hours in SAR, shown as 1,275 ر.س). Paired with a 'Start Focus' (ابدأ تركيز) action button in the top bar, linking to the Deep Work view.

nodes.label: sanad-cases.png

nodes.label: CasesView / Case Board
nodes.summary: The primary case-management view in Sanad, rendered as a drag-and-drop Kanban board with four pipeline stages. Hosts a '+ New case' action button and shows aggregate counts per column. Active case count (6) displayed in subtitle.

nodes.label: Case Workflow Stages
nodes.summary: Four sequential pipeline stages for legal case progression visible in the board: Drafting (2), Client Review (2), Filed (2), Closed (1). Colour-coded column headers indicate stage category. Cases may be dragged across stages.

nodes.label: Case Entity / Data Model
nodes.summary: A legal case record rendered on each card with: title, client name, priority level (Normal / High / Urgent / Low), one or more type tags (contract, ip, litigation, corporate, consultation), ISO due date, optional countdown (e.g. '5d left', '3d left'), and a monetary value in SAR (e.g. 1,200,000 SAR). Some cases show 0 value, indicating unbilled or pro-bono matters.

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation

Install to desktop for daily access.' and 'Timer & UI state cached locally — minimal server load.'

nodes.label: PWA / Home-Server Design
nodes.summary: The app communicates its PWA posture in two places: sidebar hints ('PWA-enabled. Install to desktop for daily access.' / 'Timer & UI state cached locally — minimal server load.') and the footer ('Home-server optimized · PWA enabled'). Signals offline-capable, locally-cached UI state, and desktop-installability as design goals.

nodes.label: Start Focus Button (ابدأ تركيز)

nodes.label: Role Switcher (Student / Lawyer)
nodes.description: Toggle UI in the top navigation bar allowing switching between 'طالب' (Student) and 'محامي' (Lawyer/Attorney) roles. In the screenshot the Lawyer role is active (highlighted). This is a core UX feature enabling the same user to switch between legal professional and student learning contexts.

nodes.label: Top Navigation Bar

nodes.label: ⌘K Quick Search / Command Palette

nodes.label: Sanad App Identity & Purpose
nodes.description: Bottom status bar text: 'سند — لوحة العمليات اليومية للمحامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية' (Sanad — Daily operations dashboard for lawyers and small businesses in Saudi Arabia). Defines the product's core identity: Arabic-first, Saudi market, legal professionals and SMBs.

nodes.label: sanad-dark.png
nodes.description: Dark-theme screenshot of the Sanad application showing the Tasks view. The UI is a legal task management dashboard for Saudi legal and SME professionals, rendered in a dark color scheme (dark slate background, teal/green accent colors). Header shows 'Sanad — سند — Daily Operations' with clock, refresh, theme toggle, and user avatar. Left sidebar lists: Dashboard, Compliance (badge:4), Case Board, Deep Work, Tasks (active, badge:8), Documents. Sidebar footer notes: PWA-enabled, timer & UI state cached locally. Main panel shows Tasks heading with subtitle 'Daily to-dos + auto-generated follow-ups from document lifecycle events.' Filter tabs: All(8), Today(0), Overdue(0), Auto-generated(1). Five visible tasks: 'Update client on Gulf Pharma'(Urgent), 'Confirm hearing date – Family Inheritance Case #218'(High), 'Draft SPA revisions – Gulf Pharma M&A'(Urgent), 'Schedule GOSI payment'(High), 'Review MHRSD labor law update'(Normal). Footer: 'Sanad — Operational dashboard for Saudi legal & SME professionals | Home-server optimized · PWA enabled'.

nodes.label: Sanad Tasks View
nodes.description: The Tasks view in Sanad shows daily to-dos plus auto-generated follow-ups derived from document lifecycle events. Tasks are filterable by All, Today, Overdue, and Auto-generated. Each task has a priority label (Urgent/High/Normal), a due date with relative offset, and optional case/matter tag linking it to a specific legal matter.

nodes.label: Sanad Dark Theme
nodes.description: The dark theme variant of the Sanad UI uses a dark slate/charcoal background with teal-green accent colors for active nav items and primary action buttons. Badge counts appear in orange/amber. Priority labels use red (Urgent), amber (High), and gray (Normal). The header contains a theme toggle icon suggesting light/dark switching.

nodes.label: Sanad PWA Capability
nodes.description: The sidebar footer explicitly notes 'PWA-enabled. Install to desktop for daily access.' and 'Timer & UI state cached locally — minimal server load.' The app footer also confirms 'Home-server optimized · PWA enabled'. This reflects a design philosophy of running Sanad as a Progressive Web App on a home server with local caching for performance.

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation Structure
nodes.description: The left sidebar navigation of Sanad contains six primary sections: Dashboard, Compliance (with alert badge), Case Board, Deep Work, Tasks (with task count badge), and Documents. This mirrors the main feature areas of a legal practice management tool. A user avatar circle sits at the bottom-left corner.

nodes.label: Morning Dashboard (لوحة التحكم الصباحية)

nodes.label: Client Management / CRM (إدارة العملاء)

properties.detail: لا يوجد نموذج Client إطلاقاً. العميل مجرد نص في حقل القضية. لا دليل عملاء، لا هاتف/بريد، لا سجل تعاملات

nodes.label: Deep Work & Billing (العمل العميق والفوترة)

missing: meeting mode (exists in DB but not exposed)

nodes.label: Invoice Creation (إنشاء الفواتير)
nodes.summary: Converting billable hours to invoices. Status: CRITICAL MISSING. No Invoice model. Hours are recorded but cannot be converted to invoices — the conversion loop is broken.

properties.detail: لا يوجد نموذج Invoice. الساعات تُسجّل لكن لا يمكن تحويلها إلى فاتورة. حلقة التحويل مكسورة

nodes.label: Task Management (إدارة المهام)
nodes.summary: Daily task lists + automatic follow-ups. Status: Partial. Can add/complete/filter tasks but cannot edit/delete, 'in progress' status unused, no subtasks.

nodes.label: Document Lifecycle (دورة حياة المستندات)
nodes.summary: Draft → Sent → Active → Expired document flow. Status: Partial. Status tracking and automatic task generation work, but no file attachments, no document templates, no edit/delete.

nodes.label: Communications Log (سجل الاتصالات)
nodes.summary: Log of calls, emails, meetings with clients. Status: CRITICAL MISSING. No communications log exists at all — lawyer manages client relationships entirely from memory, a professional liability risk.

properties.detail: لا يوجد سجل اتصالات إطلاقاً. المحامي يدير علاقته بالعميل في ذاكرته فقط — خطر مهني

nodes.label: Sanad Persona-Fit Matrix
nodes.summary: A strategic persona-fit matrix for the Sanad (سند) legal platform. Rows are four user personas (private/independent lawyer, legal analyst/consultant, law student, general public). Columns are five platform features (document & contract management, daily system summary, billing & work hours, compliance & renewal tracking, case & client management). Each cell shows a score 0-5 and a usage-frequency label (أساسي يومياً / مفيد جداً / ثانوي / هامشي / نادراً / لا يستخدم). Strategic conclusion: Sanad is purpose-built for independent lawyers and small firms — every feature scores 5/essential for that segment. Legal analysts are a strong secondary segment (Enterprise tier, no billing). Law students and general public are not core targets.

properties.strategic_recommendation: Sanad is not a general platform. Primary: private/independent lawyers (all features essential). Secondary: legal analysts via Enterprise tier without billing. Students and citizens are not addressable by the current product without a separate product line.

nodes.label: Persona: Private / Independent Lawyer
nodes.summary: Small firm or solo practitioner. Scores 5/essential on all five Sanad features. Identified as the ideal primary customer — every feature is used daily.

nodes.label: Persona: Legal Analyst / Consultant
nodes.summary: In-house or government legal department employee. Scores 5 on daily summary, 4 on documents/compliance/cases, but only 2 on billing (marginal — employee, not biller). Strong secondary segment; recommend Enterprise tier without billing focus.

nodes.label: Persona: Law Student
nodes.summary: Preparatory or tamyeez-year law student. Only daily summary scores essential (5); billing rarely used (1), compliance and cases marginal (2 each). Recommendation: offer a free Sanad Daily page instead of targeting students as primary users.

nodes.label: Persona: General Public / Citizen
nodes.summary: Small business owner or employee. Daily summary scores 4 (useful for personal compliance — residency, permits, renewals). Billing not used (0). Documents rarely used (1). Not a target for current Sanad; serving citizens would require a completely separate product.

nodes.label: Feature: Daily System Summary (الموجز اليومي للأنظمة)
nodes.summary: The only feature that scores high across ALL four personas (5, 5, 5, 4). The broadest-appeal feature of the Sanad platform, relevant even to general public for tracking personal compliance reminders.

properties.description: Application brand mark: a stylized white 'Z' letterform on a near-black (#2D2D2D) rounded-rectangle background, 30×30 viewBox. The Z is composed of three white shapes (top bar, diagonal stroke, bottom bar) grouped under a CSS 'z-breathe' animation that pulses opacity from 0.7 to 1.0 over 2.5s ease-in-out. Used as the primary app icon and manifest icon.
The visual identity of the Sanad legal practice management application, expressed through the Z-mark logo icon.

A minimalist geometric 'Z' letterform constructed from three SVG paths/polygons in white on a dark rounded-rectangle badge. The top and bottom horizontal bars have angled ends to smoothly connect with the diagonal stroke.

An inline CSS @keyframes animation named 'breathe' applied to the .z-breathe class. Cycles opacity from 0.7 at 0%/100% to 1.0 at 50% over 2.5s with ease-in-out timing, repeated infinitely. Creates a subtle pulsing/living-brand effect on the Z letterform.
Role of logo.svg as the primary application icon referenced by the PWA web manifest and layout metadata, providing the favicon and home-screen icon for the Sanad app.
